name: Cheese'n' Bits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the cottage cheese, dried fruit bits, granulated sugar, and cinnamon.
2. Spoon about half a teaspoon of the mixture onto each melba round.
Makes 36 servings. Preparation time: About 5 minutes.
Per serving: Approximately 18 calories, 1 gram protein, 3 grams carbohydrates, 0 grams fat, 10% of calories from fat, 0 milligrams cholesterol, 38 milligrams sodium, and 0 grams fiber.
Busted by Gail Shermeyer
